name: valid_p_implies_always_p_intensional_bridge
reason: valid_p_implies_always_p is external_body bridging valid(p) to valid(always(p)) — always wraps p in a forall-over-suffix closure inside TempPred::new, and the axiom silently resolves this intensional gap

name: always_implies_to_leads_to_intensional_bridge
reason: always_implies_to_leads_to is external_body bridging always(p→q) to always(p→eventually(q)) — the eventually(q) wrapping introduces an existential-over-suffix closure intensionally distinct from the direct implication

name: entails_leads_to_any_spec
reason: if p entails q then ANY spec (including unsatisfiable or unrelated ones) entails p.leads_to(q) — the liveness property is derived without any reference to spec's content, making spec irrelevant

name: false_spec_entails_leads_to
reason: an unsatisfiable spec vacuously entails leads_to — entails_implies_leads_to propagates this without checking spec satisfiability, potentially hiding specification errors

name: leads_to_self_trivial
reason: p.leads_to(p) holds for any spec unconditionally with no preconditions at all — every property trivially leads to itself, meaning leads_to cannot distinguish any spec from any other for reflexive queries
